title: Protocol for DNA extraction and shotgun metagenomic sequencing for the study of the mice digestive microbiota
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5206g","text":"This protocol describes the procedures for whole DNA extraction, high throughput sequencing, metagenomic read mapping and bioinformatical pre-processing to determine the microbial composition and functional potential of the mice digestive microbiota.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"ci734","text":"Ensure proper sampling and samples conservation before proceeding to DNA extraction.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: DNA extraction was performed as described in dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.dm6gpjm11gzp/v1, with modifications.
WGS high throughput sequencing was described in [1]
Read mapping was performed using the parametres described in the attached document on the MIMIC2 mice gene catalog : https://doi.org/10.15454/L11MXM
Data preprocessing was performed as described in the attached document
creator: Victoria Meslier
